subcodes.first_line: This tablet is revealed from The Realm on High to the one who has born witness to that which was revealed by The Tongue of Grandeur
subcodes.first_line_orig: کتاب انزله الرحمن لمن شرب رحیق الوحی و اعترف بما نطق به لسان العظمه انه لا
subcodes.subjects: @personal instructions, @rejection by the people of the Bayan, @station of the Manifestation of God, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
